content:
Your code is already correct. It splits the string by spaces and then further splits each part based on the "–" character to get the product details. It retrieves the product price from the `priceList` using the product name (productDetails[1]). Then it calculates the total order price by multiplying the quantity (orderData[1]) with the product price.

Please note that you need to ensure that the product name is present in the `priceList`. If not, a NoSuchElementException will be thrown. You may want to handle this exception according to your application's needs.
